name: Escanor's Axe (Rhitta)
description: A massive divine battle axe radiating intense heat. Its attacks deal heavily amplified burn damage, especially potent against unarmored opponents.

name: Shadow Daggers
description: Dual glowing blue daggers that enhance movement speed and allow the user to summon shadow decoys during combat.

name: Kyoka Suigetsu
description: The sword of absolute hypnosis. Landing an M1 disables the opponent's observation Haki for 3 seconds.

name: Yamato (Vergil)
description: A legendary dark-forged katana capable of unleashing Judgment Cut combos that slice through reality itself.
